T0538.title: Malicious Package
T0538.definition: A software package that contains hidden code for credential theft, backdoors, data exfiltration, or other abuse.
T0538.description: Malicious Package is used to identify related risks, abuse patterns, control requirements, and operational signals in BREAK business-security analysis.
T0538.usageExample: Assess Malicious Package related exposure and define the corresponding controls.
